ddls:
CREATE TABLE "workouts" (
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workout session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the workout session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the workout session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the workout session */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the workout session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workout session */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport or activity (e.g., running, swimming, cycling) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of workout (e.g., workout, stress relief) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the workout session */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the workout session (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete who performed the workout */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the workout was performed */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the workout */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the workout */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Calories burned during the workout */,
  "heart_rate_average" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the workout */,
  "heart_rate_max" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate during the workout */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken during the workout */,
  "gps_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the workout location */,
  "workout_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout type */,
  "intensity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intensity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workouts_workout_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_type_id") REFERENCES workout_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workouts_intensity_id FOREIGN KEY ("intensity_id") REFERENCES workout_intensities ("intensity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workouts_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the athlete */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the athlete (e.g., athlete, coach, administrator) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team or group the athlete belongs to */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the athlete's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Short biography of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., coach, administrator) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the coach */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the coach's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Short biography of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workout_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workout type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the workout type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workout type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the workout type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workout_intensities" (
  "intensity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intensity level */,
  "intensity_name" TEXT /* Name of the intensity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intensity level */,
  "icon" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the intensity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intensity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workout_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout being commented on */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete making the comment */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach making the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_comments_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES workout_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_comments_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_comments_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("workout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workout_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout being liked */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete liking the workout */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach liking the workout */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date the workout was liked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_likes_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_likes_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_likes_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("workout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout related to the notification */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete receiving the notification */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("workout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calendar" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout related to the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., workout, meeting, rest day) */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendar_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("workout_id")
)
